name: mongodb-client
description: Install MongoDB client tools: mongosh, Database Tools, and Compass (GUI). Does NOT install or start mongod.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "$log = Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\verify\mongodb-client-verify.log'; $mongosh = Get-ChildItem 'C:\Program Files\MongoDB' -Recurse -Filter 'mongosh.exe' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; if ($mongosh) { & $mongosh --nodb --eval 'print(version())' | Out-File $log; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path (Join-Path $env:SystemDrive 'MAST') 'logs\smoke\mongodb-client-smoke.txt') -Value 'mongodb-client_ok' } else { 'mongosh.exe not found' | Out-File $log; exit 1 }"
